objective_breakdown.Category: PTO Preferences
Penalty: F1 Night Float after White Consults, SRC Consults, VA Consults, or PTO
Bonus: F1 CHF immediately before Night Float
Bonus: F1 Research adjacent to PTO
Bonus: F1 two-week PTO block
Bonus: F1 Night Float followed by Research or PTO
Bonus: S2 Research adjacent to PTO
Bonus: S2 two-week PTO block
Bonus: goodyer two-week block
Bonus: T3 two-week PTO block
Bonus: F1 consecutive non-Night-Float rotation weeks after first 8 weeks
Bonus: S2 two-week Goodyer, consult, EP, CHF, Yale Nuclear, Yale Echo, and Yale Cath runs
Bonus: S2 Research during final week
Bonus: S2 assignment to SRC Echo
Bonus: F1 holiday heavy week paired with lighter holiday week
Bonus: S2 holiday heavy week paired with lighter holiday week
Penalty: S2 uneven CCU distribution
Penalty: S2 uneven Night Float distribution
Bonus: Preferred rotation during first 24-hr call
Bonus: Prior prerequisite before first 24-hr call
Penalty: Holiday call after Thanksgiving heavy service
Penalty: 24-hr call before Research
Penalty: 24-hr call on Research
Bonus: Thanksgiving-week anchor before Christmas SRC/VA call
Penalty: Repeated holiday SRC/VA call assignments
Penalty: More than one SRC/VA weekday call in one week
Penalty: SRC/VA weekday and weekend call in same week
Penalty: SRC/VA weekday and 24-hr call in same week

Penalty: Consecutive SRC/VA weekend calls
